response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-02:37: Identified ANIMA performance by ReoNa. 2. 02:37-04:12: Identified audience interaction (talk). 3. 04:12-end: Identified Idol performance by YOASOBI. 4. Used search tool to find the official lyrics for both songs in Japanese (original) and English translations. 5. Constructed final JSON structure.
response.global_summary: A video showcasing a live virtual performance by Tsunomaki Watame, featuring her singing 'ANIMA' by ReoNa and 'Idol' (アイドル) by YOASOBI, with an interlude of audience interaction.

scenes.description: Tsunomaki Watame performs the song 'ANIMA'. The performance includes dynamic lighting and virtual effects. Top-left text indicates song title.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
I wonder what the color of my soul is.
I've already broken it off,
but I run away the more I discard it.
I'm not strong enough, you know?
My heart is beating once again,
and yet I still don't know
what's the right thing to do.
Only the things without shape
are becoming important to it
(found them truly!)
Only the unadorned words
are strongly bound!
I tripped and tumbled again,
but I'm still unbreakable!
What's the color of my soul?
I may get hurt and then put up a strong front,
but I still want to find out
and confirm the true shape of my soul
Deep in the bottom alone
I search for a door and the key
All of the fairy tales disappeared like bubbles
Struggles and afterimages are on the next page
The branch is growing and splitting
and goes it's own way
(found them truly)
Lonely memories are the only things that are deeply rooted
I still kept going and lost
but I still haven't given up
Where's my heart? What's my capacity?
I was left alone
but I will want to tell you
Soul of my life, soul of my will
Forever...
Forever...
What's the color of my soul?
Red? Blue?
What's the color of my soul?
Clear past and unclear tomorrow
What's the color of your life?
I tripped and tumbled again,
but I'm still unbreakable!
What's the color of my soul?
I may get hurt and then put up a strong front,
but I still want to find out
and confirm the true shape of my soul
Forever...
Forever...
Forever...
Forever...

scenes.description: Tsunomaki Watame speaks to the audience in between performances.
Tsunomaki Watame performs the song 'Idol'. Performance includes multiple other performers joining the stage, with bottom-right text indicating the song title.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Unbeatable smile, rampaging media
I want to know that secret, mysterious
Even the sloppy parts are in her area
You, perfect and lying
Are a genius idol
What did you eat today?
What's your favorite book?
If you go out, where do you go?
I haven't eaten anything
That's a secret
Whatever you are asked
Evasive and vague
So indifferent
But brilliant
The secret that seems visible but invisible is the taste of honey
That too, none, none, none
This too, none, none, none
What is your favorite type?
Who is your partner?
Come on, answer me
'I don't even know how to love someone'
Lies or truth, who knows
Another person falls for those words
Making me fall in love again
Everyone's eyes are being stolen
You are a perfect and ultimate idol
Never appearing again
Reincarnation of the first star
With that smile, with 'I love you'
Everyone is being captivated
Those eyes, those words
Even if they are lies, they are perfect love
Yes, yes, that child is special
We are from the beginning, extras
Star's supporting actor B
It can't be all thanks to that child
Annoying
There's no way there's no jealousy or envy
This is not a joke
That's why I can't forgive
I can't forgive you if you're not perfect
I can't forgive myself
I won't acknowledge anyone but you, who is stronger than anyone
Everyone believes and worships
Truly the strongest and invincible idol
I can't see any weaknesses
Carrying the first star
Don't show your weak side, no no
Don't show the parts you don't want people to know
It must be one of a kind, no no
That is real love
With your signature smile, you stir the media
Only this secret I will keep hidden
Building a career with the lie 'I love you'
This is my love
Sweat flowing is also beautiful aqua
These eyelids hiding rubies
I, singing, dancing, and fluttering, am Maria
Yes, lies are the ultimate love
I have never been loved by anyone
And I have never loved anyone
I believe that someday my lies will become truth
Someday I will definitely have everything
I am that greedy idol
Because I want to properly love everyone
I will lie again today
Wishing for the day when these words will become truth
Even so, still
I hadn't been able to say it to you and you
Finally I could say it
This is absolutely not a lie
I love you
